creator: rde@tavi.co.uk
text:
I am volunteering to take over maintainership of this port.

I already have some ports of my own, and am at this moment working on the belated update of the fcron port (I have just retired!).

My qualifications:
1) I have been a UNIX user since 1975, and BSD since 1977.
2) I have used FreeBSD since it first appeared (I used 386BSD when it appeared).
3) I have done some ports of my own, and fixed others.
4) I have been using SIMH for some years.
5) I am currently working on a substantial simulator project using the SIMH framework; thus I understand the internals.

I have produced an update to the latest (last) distribution from simh.trailing-edge.com, and that is ready to go. I then plan to produce updates using the code now hosted on github (this is 4.x).

I hope this is all that is needed. For historical reasons, my bugzilla account is under rde@tavi.co.uk, but I'd like the maintainer recorded as bob@eager.cx, in common with other ports.

Bob Eager
bob@eager.cx
